scripts.build: pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.start:all: kill-port 5103 5102 && sleep 1 && echo '\n[start:all] API → http://localhost:5103  |  WEB → http://localhost:5102\n' && PORT=5103 pnpm --filter api start & PORT=5102 pnpm --filter web start & wait
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/web/.nuxt apps/web/.output apps/web/node_modules/.vite apps/api/dist node_modules/.cache && echo 'Cleaned all caches'
